media.title: What makes Knicks star Jalen Brunson so special? ‘The magic is in the work.’
media.description: This season has been another giant leap for Brunson, the crafty-yet-undersized point guard who spent much of his childhood living in Cherry Hill before becoming a star at Villanova and in the NBA.

items.title: A lot of people have had this reaction to me saying how much I've written during this Finals run. While I very much appreciate the kindness behind that, I have always felt sort of unsure I could actually write one, or write any other way than, like, 1,500 words on one topic at a
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: A lot of people have had this reaction to me saying how much I've written during this Finals run. While I very much appreciate the kindness behind that, I have always felt sort of unsure I could actually write one, or write any other way than, like, 1,500 words on one topic at a time, forever.

items.title: One of the best things about the Cubs winning the World Series in 2016 was seeing people turn the sidewalk and wall outside of Wrigley into makeshift memorials for loved ones who weren’t there to see them win it. If the Knicks win it’d be cool to see something like this in NYC.
items.author: Chris Hine
items.body_excerpt: One of the best things about the Cubs winning the World Series in 2016 was seeing people turn the sidewalk and wall outside of Wrigley into makeshift memorials for loved ones who weren’t there to see them win it. If the Knicks win it’d be cool to see something like this in NYC.

items.title: Because sports are fun, I generally prefer chaos. Wild upsets. Teams & players that do stuff they "shouldn't." Actions that make no sense.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Because sports are fun, I generally prefer chaos. Wild upsets. Teams & players that do stuff they "shouldn't." Actions that make no sense. 

It's why there's a part of me that really would find it hilarious if I'm writing about the Bucks acquiring Kyrie Irving and tripling down on the Giannis era.
